message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>
                  SARS-CoV-2 main protease (M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  ) is one of the most extensive exploited drug targets for COVID-19. Structurally disparate compounds have been reported as M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  inhibitors, raising the question of their target specificity. To elucidate the target specificity and the cellular target engagement of the claimed M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  inhibitors, we systematically characterize their mechanism of action using the cell-free FRET assay, the thermal shift-binding assay, the cell lysate Protease-Glo luciferase assay, and the cell-based Flip-GFP assay. Collectively, our results have shown that majority of the M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  inhibitors identified from drug repurposing including ebselen, carmofur, disulfiram, and shikonin are promiscuous cysteine inhibitors that are not specific to M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  , while chloroquine, oxytetracycline, montelukast, candesartan, and dipyridamole do not inhibit M
                  <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                  in any of the assays tested. Overall, our study highlights the need of stringent hit validation at the early stage of drug discovery.
                </jats:p>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Graphical abstract</jats:title>
                  <jats:fig id="ufig1" position="float" fig-type="figure" orientation="portrait">
                    <jats:graphic xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xlink:href="458041v1_ufig1" position="float" orientation="portrait"/>
                  </jats:fig>
                  <jats:p>
                    Flip-GFP and Protease-Glo luciferase assays, coupled with the FRET and thermal shift binding assays, were applied to validate the reported SARS-CoV-2 M
                    <jats:sup>pro</jats:sup>
                    inhibitors.
                  </jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
title: Validation and invalidation of SARS-CoV-2 main protease inhibitors using the Flip-GFP and Protease-Glo luciferase assays
